name: Your Honor
overview: The story of the forces that inherited wealth centered around the Woowon Group headquarters in the fictional Woowon City adjacent to the sea, the voodoo cartel that dominates the lawless area, and Judge Song Pan Ho, who comforts citizens seeking justice.

trailers.title: [1차 티저] 손현주 VS 김명민 두 아버지의 치열한 사투 | 유어 아너
